title: Iseyon to Attend Holiday Networking at Blitzen’s Dallas, TX
shortDescription: Iseyon to Attend Holiday Networking at Blitzen’s Dallas, TX
description:
**Thu., December 11, 2025 from 6–9pm**

Iseyon is excited to join a festive holiday gathering at **Blitzen’s**, the Christmas-themed pop-up bar inside the Omni Dallas Hotel. With its twinkle lights, elevated décor, and expertly crafted cocktails, Blitzen’s offers the perfect setting for relaxed conversation and seasonal networking.

We’re looking forward to connecting with Dallas-area executives in a warm, polished holiday atmosphere, enjoying Blitzen’s immersive décor, creative cocktails, and inviting vibe, and celebrating the season with great company and memorable holiday spirit.

[https://www.strategysoftware.com/events/holiday-dallas](https://www.strategysoftware.com/events/holiday-dallas)
